subject: Re: tomorrow...
body:
Stay home

Sent from my iPhone

On May 18, 2008, at 7:27 PM, "Lesley Groff" <lesley@nysgllc.com> wrote:

Hello Jeffrey!  The doctor's office I have my appt at tomorrow does not open until 9:15am...I don't want to sit around here until 9:15 only to be told I can't change my  appointment time.  How about I come in at 8:30 and stay till 11:45...I need to be on the 12:05 train home to make my appt...that way at least I can be there for you for some of the day...!!!
 
I hope you are doing well and had a good weekend@!
 
Lesley
 
 
 
 
 
 
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
